summary: Bug fix verification completed: Fence before/after image swaps successfully implemented in both React app and static HTML site. All 6 gallery cards display correctly with proper image assignments.
passed_tests: React app loads without runtime errors
Static HTML site loads without errors
Gallery displays exactly 6 cards in both versions
First fence pair correctly swapped: Before card uses fence-after-wide.jpg, After card uses fence-before-wide.jpg
Second fence pair correctly swapped: Before card uses fence-after-gate.jpg, After card uses fence-before-gate.jpg
Deck before/after cards remain unchanged (deck-before.jpg and deck-after-2.jpg)
All 6 gallery images load successfully in both versions
All 4 fence image files exist and are accessible
Book consultation buttons work correctly (hero, header, footer, mobile)
Services accordions/details expand and display content
Contact information displays correctly in hero and footer
Mobile CTA bar visible and functional on mobile viewport
All Google Form links point to correct URL
